name: Hidden Power, Demiurge
expansion: [EX] Extra Booster Nazarick: Tomb of the Undead Vol.3
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may choose 1 card in your hand, and put it into your stock.

【AUTO】 [Put 1 card from your hand into your waiting room] When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may pay the cost. If you do, reveal the top card of your deck, choose 1 level X or lower character in your waiting room, and return it to your hand. X is equal to the level of the revealed card. (Climax are regarded as level 0. Return the revealed card to its original place)

name: Unfathomable Power, Jaldabaoth
expansion: [EX] Extra Booster Nazarick: Tomb of the Undead Vol.3
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, if your opponent's center stage has 1 or less characters, you may choose 1 cost 0 or lower character in your opponent's center stage, and put it into their waiting room.

【AUTO】 [Put 1 yellow or 《Grotesque Race》 or 《Nazarick》 character from your hand into your waiting room] When this card is placed on the stage from your hand or put into your waiting room from the stage, you may pay the cost. If you do, draw 1 card.
flavor_text: Even insects can be quite aggravating in such large numbers.

name: Brewing Conspiracy, Demiurge
expansion: [EX] Extra Booster Nazarick: Tomb of the Undead Vol.3
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, put the top 2 cards of your deck into your waiting room. If there is a climax among those cards, choose 1 character in your opponent's center stage, and that character gets -1000 power until end of turn.

【AUTO】 [(1) Put the top card of your deck into your clock] When this card is put into your waiting room from the stage, you may pay the cost. If you do, choose 1 yellow or 《Grotesque Race》 or 《Nazarick》 character in your waiting room, and return it to your hand.
flavor_text: Have there been any problems thus far?

name: Masked Great Demon, Jaldabaoth
expansion: [EX] Extra Booster Nazarick: Tomb of the Undead Vol.3
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, this card gets +1500 power until end of turn.

【AUTO】 【CXCOMBO】 When this card attacks, if "Tenth-Tier Magic, 〈Meteor Fall〉" is in your climax area, and you have 3 or more other characters, put the top 2 cards of your deck into your waiting room, choose up to 1 level X or lower yellow or 《Grotesque Race》 or 《Nazarick》 character in your waiting room, and return it to your hand. If the character you chose is level 3 or higher, this card gets +3000 power until end of turn. X is equal to the total level of the cards put into your waiting room by this effect. (Climax are regarded as level 0)
flavor_text: It's a pleasure to meet you, people of the Sacred Kingdom. My name is Jaldabaoth.

name: Sacred Princess of Purity, Calca Bessarez
expansion: [EX] Extra Booster Nazarick: Tomb of the Undead Vol.3
ability: 【AUTO】 [(1) Put 1 yellow character from your hand into your waiting room] When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may pay the cost. If you do, look at up to X cards from the top of your deck, choose up to 1 card from among them, put it into your hand, and put the rest into your waiting room. X is equal to the number of characters your opponent has.
【AUTO】 When a climax is placed on your opponent's climax area, you may put this card into your stock.

name: High Priestess of the Sacred Kingdom's Priesthood, Kelart Custodio
expansion: [EX] Extra Booster Nazarick: Tomb of the Undead Vol.3
ability: 【CONT】 If your stock has 2 or less cards, this card gets +1500 power.

【AUTO】 [(1) Put 1 card from your hand into your waiting room] When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may pay the cost. If you do, search your deck for up to 1 yellow character, reveal it to your opponent, put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.

expansion: [EX] Extra Booster Nazarick: Tomb of the Undead Vol.3
ability: 【AUTO】 When your other yellow character attacks, this card gets +X power until end of turn. X is equal to the number of other yellow characters you have ×500.

【AUTO】 Encore [Put 1 character from your hand into your waiting room] (When this card is put into your waiting room from the stage, you may pay the cost. If you do, return this card to its previous stage position as 【REST】)

name: Effortless Exchange, Jaldabaoth
expansion: [EX] Extra Booster Nazarick: Tomb of the Undead Vol.3

【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, look at up to 4 cards from the top of your deck, choose up to 1 climax from among them, reveal it to your opponent, put it into your hand, and put the rest into your waiting room. If you put 1 card into your hand, choose 1 card in your hand, and put it into your waiting room.

name: Embodiment of Evil, Jaldabaoth
expansion: [EX] Extra Booster Nazarick: Tomb of the Undead Vol.3

【AUTO】 【CXCOMBO】 [Put this card into your waiting room] When "Let Sweet Cries Resound" is placed on your climax area, you may pay the cost. If you do, choose 1 "True Form, Evil Lord of Wrath" in your waiting room, and put it in the stage position that this card was in.

If you do, choose 1 of the following effects, and perform it. "【STAND】 this card." "Choose up to 3 characters in your waiting room, return them to your hand, return all cards from your waiting room to your deck, and shuffle your deck."
